title: andropogon contortus subsp. allionii
intro: Andropogon contortus subsp. allionii, also known as Allionia, is a type of plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Allionia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Allionia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it may also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
